heading: Preemption and election of State nonapplicability
label: 14502 Preemption and election of State nonapplicability

children.heading: Preemption
children.label: a Preemption
children.text: This chapter preempts the laws of any State to the extent that such laws are inconsistent with this chapter, except that this chapter shall not preempt any State law that provides additional protection from liability relating to volunteers or to any category of volunteers in the performance of services for a nonprofit organization or governmental entity.

children.heading: Election of State regarding nonapplicability
children.label: b Election of State regarding nonapplicability

children.text: citing the authority of this subsection;
declaring the election of such State that this chapter shall not apply, as of a date certain, to such civil action in the State; and
